name: Mesa de Ayuda - COPC SA

_blocked_tasks.task_4_remove_tagging_subflow: Pendiente — eliminar 9 nodos: Asignacion de Tags (webhook), Set Data Webhook, Formatear JSON, Basic LLM Chain, Groq Chat Model, Structured Output Parser, Set Data Agent, Formatear datos, Insert rows in a table. Renombrar workflow a 'Mesa de Ayuda - WhatsApp Bot'.
_blocked_tasks.task_5_replace_email_path: Pendiente — reemplazar 8 nodos del path email (Aggregate, If1, Descargar Archivos, Enviar Ticket, Enviar Ticket con Archivos, Parse Email Data, Parse Attachments Data, Send message ack post-email) por cadena HTTP: Item Lists → HTTP Get Meta media URL → HTTP Get binary → Code base64 → Aggregate → Code Build payload → HTTP POST /webhooks/whatsapp/import → If success → Send WhatsApp success / Notificar Error.
_blocked_tasks.task_6_remove_dead_nodes: Pendiente — eliminar 3 nodos disabled: OpenAI, Asignación de Agente, Set Data Webhook1.
_blocked_tasks.task_7_idempotency_message_id: BLOCKED — n8n Redis v1 node no expone SET NX nativo. Requiere workaround con INCR+TTL (clave 'mesadeayuda:msg:{messageId}' con ttl=86400; INCR retorna 1=primer intento, >1=duplicado) o un Code node con cliente Redis npm.
_blocked_tasks.task_8_lock_phone_number: BLOCKED — mismo workaround SET NX. Clave 'mesadeayuda:lock:{phone}' con ttl=60. Delete lock al salir de confirm/cancel/error paths.
_blocked_tasks.task_10_error_subflow: Pendiente — sub-grafo 'Notificar Error al Usuario' con Build error msg → HTTP POST Meta → Log → Delete session → Delete lock. Conectar Continue On Fail en HTTP críticos al sub-flujo.

_workaround_notes.redis_set_nx: n8n-nodes-base.redis@1 operations available: delete|get|incr|info|keys|llen|pop|publish|push|set. No SET NX. Options: (a) Code node + 'redis' npm package + SET key value NX EX. (b) INCR + EXPIRE (atomic with Lua via SCRIPT, or use n8n's INCR operation with expire flag — INCR returning 1 means key was newly created). (c) Migrate to a fork of the Redis node that exposes NX.
_workaround_notes.alternative_proposed: Use Redis INCR with expire/ttl. INCR atomically increments key by 1, creating key if missing. If response.value === 1, lock acquired; if > 1, duplicate/contention. Combine with the existing 'expire'+'ttl' params on INCR operation.

_current_node_summary: 30+ nodes including WhatsApp Trigger, Parse Data Whatsapp, Redis Get/Update/Delete Session, Switch (7-way FSM router), 11 Code nodes for FSM states, 4 Switch nodes for sub-routing, 2 HTTP Request for Meta API, 9 nodes for tagging sub-flow (to remove), 8 nodes for email path (to replace), 3 disabled nodes (to remove).
_source_of_truth: Live workflow at https://n8n.alexandercaicedo.dev/workflow/YrY1cuaU5YobAUGu — fetch with mcp__claude_ai_n8n__get_workflow_details before each Task 4-10 attempt.
